classes.label: Organization
classes.description: A legal entity encompassing departments, employees, and business operations.

classes.label: Department
classes.description: An organizational unit responsible for a distinct business function.

classes.label: Employee
classes.description: A person who works for an organization in a defined capacity.

classes.label: Manager
classes.description: An employee responsible for leading a department or team.

classes.label: Data Asset
classes.description: A managed data resource governed by organizational policies for quality and compliance.

classes.label: Data Steward
classes.description: A person responsible for the quality, lineage, and compliance of a data domain.

properties.label: has department
properties.description: Links an organization to its departments.

properties.label: manages
properties.description: Links a manager to the department they lead.

properties.label: owns
properties.description: Links a department to the data assets it is responsible for.

properties.label: stewards
properties.description: Links a data steward to the data assets they govern.
